assertions.description: U501 (AMS1117-3.3) correctly identified as LDO topology with input_rail='+5V' and output_rail='+3V3', vout=3.3V via fixed_suffix heuristic.
Both MMBT3904 transistors detected with correct base/collector/emitter net assignments (EN, RTS, DTR, RST signals), base resistors included.
USB+ and USB- correctly identified as differential pair with has_esd:true attributed to U201 (ESP32-S3-MINI which has integrated USB PHY with ESD).

RX-485 (3 MAX485/MAX3486 RO outputs tied together) and RX-CAN (ISO1050DUB + TJA1051T RXD tied together) both correctly flagged as output conflicts. These are real topology concerns even if intentional.
